insights.title: Forecast → — App Total Revenue likely steady next period — App Total New Subs in line with upstream.
insights.body: App Total New Subs +4.5% moves with its upstream (App Total New User -4.8%); no outsized App Total Revenue swing expected from the trial cohort next period.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue is tracking its subs signal as expected.
insights.body: App Total Revenue 07-13 vs 07-06 = -4.1% tracks its 7-day driver App Total New Subs 07-06 vs 06-29 = -9.5% — revenue is following the subs signal as expected.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YMK surging (+17.5% vs upstream -3.8%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YMK +17.5% vs upstream -3.8% (conversion surging); All App +4.5% vs upstream -4.8% (conversion surging). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: Broad-based — App Total New User down across every app — broad-based, look for a platform-wide cause.
insights.body: App Total New User is down across every app (All App -4.8%, YMK -3.8%, YCP -6.4%) — a broad move, so look for a platform-wide cause, not an app-specific one.

insights.title: Data gap — 3 slice(s) missing data — excluded from analysis.
insights.body: 3 slice(s) n/a (missing data): All App·All·App Total Install, YCP·All·App Total Install, YMK·All·App Total Install.
